coverage_note: The bundled LEP population database stores gene-level and marker-level interpretation notes, but does not embed a full ancestry-frequency matrix for these markers yet.
gene_population_patterns_intro: Broader population patterns curated from LEP adipose endocrine signaling, hypothalamic appetite regulation, energy expenditure, puberty/fertility signaling, and inflammatory crosstalk and condition-association literature.

sources.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000174697: LEP coordinate source

gene_population_patterns.summary: LEP findings should be read against adipose endocrine signaling, hypothalamic appetite regulation, energy expenditure, puberty/fertility signaling, and inflammatory crosstalk; population frequency, ascertainment, and phenotype definition can change the apparent effect size.

rs7799039 (LEP promoter marker) is curated as a LEP marker for Energy balance and obesity context, Leptin deficiency review context; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.
LEP deficiency model is curated as a LEP marker for Energy balance and obesity context, Leptin deficiency review context; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.
